7.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
7.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

7.gl: the heart, i.e. (figuratively) the thoughts or feelings (mind); also (by analogy) the middle

8.gl: figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
8.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

8.gl: graciousness (as gratifying), of manner or act (abstract or concrete; literal, figurative or spiritual; especially the divine influence upon the heart, and its reflection in the life; including gratitude)
8.kj: acceptable, benefit, favour, gift, grace(- ious), joy, liberality, pleasure, thank(-s, -worthy)
